issues.description: Missing condition that restricts AttachDon target to only {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type Leader or Character. The target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' allows any character/leader, but the effect text specifies 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type Leader or Character cards'
Missing cost specification for the Activated trigger. The effect text states '[Activate: Main] You may rest this Character', indicating this Character must be rested as a cost to activate
